ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company posting the job */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the job posting's source page */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the job posting's image */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the job was posted */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., Full Time, Part Time, Internship) */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "work_arrangement" TEXT /* Work arrangement (e.g., Remote, On-site, Hybrid) */,
  "experience_required" INTEGER /* Years of experience required */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the company */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the company's website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being posted */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the job belongs to */,
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job type */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who posted the job */,
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hiring manager overseeing the job */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the job posting has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_type_id") REFERENCES job_types ("job_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_hiring_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("hiring_manager_id") REFERENCES hiring_managers ("hiring_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the candidate */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's profile */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's LinkedIn profile */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's GitHub profile */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's portfolio */,
  "education" TEXT /* Candidate's educational background */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Candidate's skills */,
  "work_experience" TEXT /* Candidate's work experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate submitting the application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "date_applied" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cover letter associated with the application */,
  "resume_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resume associated with the application */,
  "application_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_resume_id FOREIGN KEY ("resume_id") REFERENCES resumes ("resume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_cover_letter_id FOREIGN KEY ("cover_letter_id") REFERENCES cover_letters ("cover_letter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resumes" (
  "resume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resume */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate owning the resume */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resume file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the resume file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the resume was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the resume (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the resume file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resumes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cover_letters" (
  "cover_letter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cover letter */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate owning the cover letter */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the cover letter file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the cover letter file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the cover letter was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the cover letter (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover letter file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cover_letter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cover_letters_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate hired as an employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company hiring the employee */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job the employee was hired for */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the employee holds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employee */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employee (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., company, candidate) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recruiter, hiring manager, candidate) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account being granted the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., post_job, view_applications) */,
  "date_granted" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_permissions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruiters" (
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruiter */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account belonging to the recruiter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the recruiter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recruiter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recruiter */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the recruiter in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hiring_managers" (
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hiring manager */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account belonging to the hiring manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the hiring manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hiring manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the hiring manager */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the hiring manager in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hiring_manager_id")
)
